title: Vegetarian Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with australian vegetables and served with a side of gooey sauce.

ingredients.name: australian vegetables (such as bell peppers and broccoli)
buttery sauce (made from butter and stir fry sauce)
gooy sauce (made from stir fry sauce and water)

instructions: Heat buttery sauce in a pan over medium heat.
Add australian vegetables to the pan and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Serve the vegetables with a side of gooey sauce.
Optional: add stir-fry sauce to the pan and stir-fry for another minute.
